feat.name: Disarming Block
feat.text: With deft and practiced movement, you block at an angle to potentially dislodge the weapon. You attempt to Disarm the creature whose attack you blocked of the weapon they attacked you with. You can do so even if you don’t have a hand free.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: You Shield Block a melee Strike made with a held weapon.
